text_block_list.text:
While out shopping, I notice Nice Nature and
Matikanetannhauser out with a young
Umamusume girl.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: What about these shoes, kiddo?

text_block_list.name: Energetic Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Oooh! Yeah, I'll take those! Thanks, Nature!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Awww! They look so cute and easy to run in! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I'm glad you like them. If you're happy, I'm happy.
choice_data_list: Out shopping with your little sister?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Oh, nothing like that! I got to know this
kiddo during my volunteer activities.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: She asked us to help her pick out some shoes!

text_block_list.name: Energetic Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! Next time, with these shoes, I'm definitely gonna win!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ohooo, look at you getting all fired up. That's
kids these days for ya. Brimming with energy!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
That's right! And sometimes you get fired up too,
right, Nature?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Nahhh, definitely not. If anything, I get humbled
before I even have the chance to get fired up...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Phew... Individual training complete and my legs
are feeling great. All that's left is to actually win.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Argh! I tied with you again, McQueen?! Quit latching onto me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Excuse me?! The sentiment is mutual! I was supposed to seize victory by a huge margin!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... I couldn't... even... line up... alongside... them...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...Hahaha. Guess that's all I can manage, no
matter how hard I try...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
And that's how I got humbled... Probably not
somethin' young folks like you can relate to, huh?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: That's not true... I can definitely relate. I mean...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: You're my Teio and my McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...What?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, I'm just your average Umamusume... A lot
of the time, I don't even place in races.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: But you! You're always placing in the top five! That consistency is amazing! I want to be just like you!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Tannhauser...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh! But if you're going to be down on yourself, I
can use this chance to finally catch up to you!

text_block_list.name: Energetic Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, this is our chance! We're gonna surpass
you, Nature!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Heh.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ahahah! Hehehe! It's been ages since I laughed
that hard.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Who'd have thought little old me could get you
two fired up? Looks like hope's not lost on the
young'uns yet!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... I guess that really does mean I've gotta
stay on my toes.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... I guess that really does mean I've gotta
stay on my toes.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ack... W-well, I suppose I am still somethin' of a
rookie myself...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
All right! I'm all fired up and burning with passion!
I won't lose to you, Nature!

text_block_list.name: Energetic Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, watch out, Nature! We're coming for you!
Wooo!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
S-stop! Stop, what if someone hears you?! Talk
about embarrassing.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Sigh... How do Teio and McQueen stay so calm when people say all those cheesy things? They even have comebacks!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I think I need to prepare myself mentally before I
even think about challenging them...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Uh... so what, you gonna pour everything you've
got into giving guidance or something?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oooh! A strong opponent has emerged! Now we've really gotta focus!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Yeesh... Personally, I'd prefer it if my "strong
opponents" would ease up on the pressure a
little...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But ah well... I guess I'll get some new shoes too.
I've gotta be prepared for any up-and-coming
challengers, after all.
